subcodes.first_line: Know thou, O thou who gazest upon the Countenance, that calamities have encompassed Us, and amidst their depths We summon mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاعلم یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه بان البلایاء احاطتنا و نحن فی غمراتها ندع الناس
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @light and darkness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
